kpis.name: OTD Accuracy
kpis.description: On Time Delivery — failing badly, impacting well production schedules

kpis.name: Batch Consistency
kpis.description: Spec compliance — one contamination event in May (Batch-12B)

kpis.name: Lab Turnaround
kpis.description: Field sample analysis — nearly double the contractual SLA

kpis.name: Stock Coverage
kpis.description: Days of safety stock held at Daleel warehouse — critically low

incidents.description: Batch-12B scale inhibitor contamination discovered pre-injection. Caused 48h production delay on South Block.

notes: Sahara's technical expertise is genuine — they are the ONLY qualified supplier of High-H2S production inhibitors for Daleel's South Block wells. However their execution is increasingly unreliable. OTD has collapsed to 79.5%, lab turnaround is nearly double contractual SLA, and safety stock is critically low. The contamination incident in May was a near-miss. Sole-source dependency creates significant risk.
